message:
feat(dep): integrate rich output into dep subcommands

- dep add/rm: Visual confirmation with arrow notation and relationship details
- dep list: Panel with tree-like hierarchy (├──, └──) and colored status
- dep tree: rich_rust Tree component with status badges
- dep cycles: Red-highlighted warning Panel for cycle paths

Closes beads_rust-1g8e

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
